/.hero_video_brutalist: YOUR ENTRY INTO THE WORLD OF GAMING.
/.mission_statement_avatars: Pixel Perfect is a creative agency based in the United Arab Emirates, building in-game experiences, branded content, esports partnerships, and gamified storytelling for gaming audiences.
/.global_impact_stats: 6 YEARS. 90+ DELIVERED PROJECTS. BRANDS, GOVERNMENT ENTITIES, BROADCAST NETWORKS, EVENTS, GAME PUBLISHERS.
/.tech_stack_ticker: UNREAL ENGINE // UEFN // UNITY // COUNTER-STRIKE 2 // DECENTRALAND // BLENDER // ADOBE PHOTOSHOP // AFTER EFFECTS // PREMIERE PRO
/.client_trust_marquee: TRUSTED BY: TENCENT, EPIC GAMES, RIOT GAMES, BLIZZARD, DUBAI POLICE, RED BULL.

/services.services_header: MARKETING CAMPAIGNS. LIVE BROADCAST. CONTENT PRODUCTION. EVENT MANAGEMENT.
/services.service_marketing_campaigns: Pixel Perfect helps brands use the most trending and effective tools that the gaming and esports landscape offers.
/services.service_live_broadcast_gallery: Live broadcast and TV production for esports, including custom stages, virtual studios, tournament organization, and VOD packages like Masters of Esports on ADtv.
/services.service_island_dev_spotlight: Creative island and map development from A to Z inside Fortnite Creative, UEFN, Unity, Decentraland, and Counter-Strike 2.
/services.service_influencer_campaigns: Influencer campaigns that connect brands with the right gaming and esports creators, driving authentic engagement and measurable ROI.
/services.service_content_production: Gaming and esports content production at every scale, from campaign key visuals and digital posters to influencer videos, ads, trailers, and documentary filming.
/services.service_event_management: Online and offline gaming event management, including convention participation, on-ground activations, product showcases, and community experiences.
/services.software_capabilities_grid: Unity for gameplay and real-time optimization. Unreal Engine and UEFN for playable environments. Blender for 3D assets. Adobe tools for UI, motion, video, and campaign visuals.

/portfolio.portfolio_intro: Selected work across playable brand worlds, custom maps, metaverse experiences, broadcast ecosystems, and campus esports.

/portfolio/nestle.case_study_hero: Nestle Cereal Season: a playable Fortnite Creative campaign with mall activations, ecommerce integration, and point-of-sale materials across the Gulf.
/portfolio/nestle.fortnite_island_overview: The campaign introduced a fully playable Nestle-themed world inside Fortnite, where players explored branded spaces, played themed mini-games, and completed challenges.
/portfolio/nestle.physical_pos_gallery: Pixel Perfect secured an intellectual property rights agreement between Nestle and Epic Games, allowing point-of-sale stands to be placed in key mall locations across the UAE, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman, and Saudi Arabia.
/portfolio/nestle.campaign_results: Reached over 10 million people through integrated mall activations and digital exposure. Delivered a 30% return on investment.
/portfolio/nestle.campaign_responsibilities: Game development from A to Z inside Fortnite, campaign key visuals, video trailers, point-of-sale stands, intellectual property coordination, giveaways, and a corporate event activation in Dubai.

/portfolio/swat.case_study_hero: UAE SWAT Challenge: a custom Counter-Strike 2 map built for Dubai Police and the live SWAT Challenge event.
/portfolio/swat.project_overview: The map recreates the event's visual identity, layout, and tactical atmosphere, turning the physical competition into a digital skill-based experience.
/portfolio/swat.game_mechanics: The game features four challenges: obstacle course, pistol shooting range, sniper shooting range, and hostage rescue. The final score is determined by total completion time.
/portfolio/swat.on_ground_activation: The activation included gaming computers and a leaderboard at the SWAT Challenge event, inviting visitors to play the map, set the best time, and win prizes.
/portfolio/swat.exposure: His Excellency Lieutenant General Abdullah Khalifa Al Marri, Commander-in-chief of Dubai Police, visited the Counter-Strike 2 map of the UAE SWAT Challenge.

/portfolio/meta.case_study_hero: Nestle Metaclub: the first Nestle Cereals metaverse experience, built in Unity and launched on Decentraland.
/portfolio/meta.project_overview: The project features 10 interactive attractions, combining mini-games, NFT commerce, educational storytelling, sustainability challenges, wearable NFTs, and a digital Anghami lounge.
/portfolio/meta.nft_results: The Lion Cereals wearable NFT collection sold 93% of its supply within 24 hours. A total of 1,884 NFTs were minted, with Mythic and Unique jackets selling out within 2 hours.
/portfolio/meta.media_coverage: The launch was covered by over 50 international news sources, delivering an estimated $2M+ in media value.
/portfolio/meta.space_overview: The experience included a four-floor interactive hub, Lion's Den, Koko Krunch basketball, Hot Air Balloon Tour, Nestle Farm, and Sustainability Corner.

/campus-masters.cm_hero_main_logo: CAMPUS MASTERS: A LEAGUE FOR EXTRAORDINARY GAMERS.
/campus-masters.season_3_metrics_grid: OVER 51 UNIVERSITIES ONBOARD. 3 COMPLETED SEASONS. $31,000+ USD COMBINED PRIZE POOL. 20,000+ STUDENT REACH.
/campus-masters.on_ground_events_masonry: Campus Masters unites universities across the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Jordan, Qatar, Bahrain, and Oman through structured esports tournaments.
/campus-masters.brand_integration: The league is livestreamed on YouTube and Twitch with visible logo placement, break-time commercial video, chat and livestream link integration, QR code pop-outs, and ecommerce prompts.
/campus-masters.on_ground_activations: On-ground brand activations include registration areas, product spotlight zones, direct sales opportunities, sponsored watch parties, giveaways, and student challenges.
/campus-masters.partnership_tiers_brutalist: TITLE SPONSOR: $50,000 // GOLD PARTNER: $30,000 // SILVER PARTNER: $12,000.
/campus-masters.previous_partnership_results: 67+ social media posts. 150,000+ social media views. 6 on-ground activations. 10,100+ students reached. 27 livestreams. 15,632+ live stream viewership. 167,000 livestream impressions.
/campus-masters.closing_statement: EMPOWERING STUDENTS. BUILDING A COMMUNITY. ELEVATING COMPETITION. CREATING LASTING BRAND IMPACT.
